positive: A stylized, whimsical portrait of a friendly celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting amongst glowing mushrooms and ethereal vines. The fox has magnificent, flowing fur in shades of sapphire blue and silver, with large, intelligent amber eyes. The scene uses strong contrast and deep jewel tones against a soft, glowing midnight blue background. The composition is centered, featuring clear silhouettes and decorative elements suitable for a t-shirt print. Clean line art merged with photorealistic magical elements. Volumetric lighting, highly detailed, maximalist style, UHD, digital painting.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, signature, logo, text, cropped, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, low detail, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, muted colors, boring, bland
